title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展览项目，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察而生成的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: Anomalyco/OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: Agent memory on Elasticsearch: hybrid retrieval and DLS
summary: 本文介绍了在Elasticsearch上实现代理记忆的混合检索和DLS（分布式日志搜索）方法。
highlights: Agent memory on Elasticsearch: hybrid retrieval and DLS
Comments

title: The Future of the Con Is Already Here, It's Just Not Evenly Distributed
summary: 文章探讨了诈骗（con）的未来形态，指出其已存在于当下但分布不均，可能涉及技术与社会层面的演变。
highlights: The Future of the Con Is Already Here, It's Just Not Evenly Distributed
Comments

title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
content: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
summary: OpenAI为ChatGPT Enterprise推出新的支出控制和用量分析功能，帮助组织管理成本并自信地扩展AI应用。
highlights: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise
helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence

title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
content: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.
summary: 本文介绍了GPT-5.5 Instant如何通过更强的推理能力、更好的上下文理解、更清晰的沟通以及基于医生反馈的评估来提升ChatGPT在健康和保健方面的回答质量。
highlights: GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses
stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication
physician-informed evaluations

title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
summary: 本文探讨了研究型AI代理在保护敏感信息方面的安全性，通过MosaicLeaks测试揭示了当前代理在防止数据泄露方面的漏洞，并提出了改进建议。
highlights: 研究型AI代理在处理敏感数据时存在显著的安全风险。
MosaicLeaks测试表明，现有代理难以完全防止信息泄露。
文章强调了加强代理安全设计的重要性。

title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
summary: 本文探讨了LoRA微调技术的局限性，并介绍了超越LoRA的替代方法，包括其他参数高效微调（PEFT）技术如Adapter、Prefix Tuning等，通过实验比较了不同方法在多种任务上的性能表现。
highlights: LoRA is currently the most popular fine-tuning technique, but it has limitations in certain scenarios.
Alternative PEFT methods like Adapters and Prefix Tuning can outperform LoRA in specific tasks.
The blog provides experimental comparisons across multiple benchmarks to evaluate different fine-tuning approaches.
